_comment: The /api/apple-* and /api/widget-nudge rewrites are LOAD-BEARING, not tidiness.
Those functions were merged into api/apple.ts + api/widget.ts to stay under
Vercel Hobby's 12-Serverless-Function cap, but the SHIPPED App Store build
calls the original paths and can never be changed. Removing a rewrite breaks
Apple sign-in / account deletion / the Nudges widget on every phone already
out there. The catch-all must stay LAST — rewrites match in order.
Vercel serves real files (api/*) before rewrites, so these only fire for the
